Furniture film laminating line specifications buyers compare

Furniture film laminating line specifications buyers compare: Share material, width, speed, power supply and factory country. An engineer can reply with a practical configuration. Quotations are usually prepared in USD. Electrical configuration is confirmed against the local plant supply before production. Furniture Film Laminating Machine.

1. Match the machine to the material

Share material, width, speed, power supply and factory country. An engineer can reply with a practical configuration. Furniture Film Laminating Machine: PVC decorative film, wood grain film and edge banding film.

2. Confirm width, speed and tension

Target width, Target speed, m/min, Voltage / frequency. Quotations are usually prepared in USD. Electrical configuration is confirmed against the local plant supply before production.

3. Check local power before quotation

Quotations are usually prepared in USD. Electrical configuration is confirmed against the local plant supply before production. 380 V, 50 Hz, 415 V, 50 Hz, 440 V, 60 Hz.

4. Ask for a practical layout

Send machine requirements. Share material, width, speed, power supply and factory country. An engineer can reply with a practical configuration.
